name: Google Calendar
description: List and create Google Calendar events

required_variables.description: Google OAuth2 client ID (from Google Cloud Console)

skill.name: google_calendar
skill.description: List and create Google Calendar events
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to Google Calendar tools. Use list_events to view upcoming events and create_event to schedule new ones. Always confirm event details with the user before creating.

IMPORTANT: If a tool returns a message saying the user is not logged in, relay that message to the user and tell them to use /login (Telegram) or !login (Discord) to connect their Google account. Do NOT retry the tool until the user confirms they have logged in.

tools.name: list_events

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 10)

time_min.description: Start time in RFC3339 format (default: now)

tools.name: create_event
